message:
feat(parity): NodeView.data() helper for MultiGraph and MultiDiGraph

Closes franken_networkx-kr3b.

Adds data() method to MultiGraphNodeView and MultiDiGraphNodeView that
returns a list of (node, attrs) tuples, matching NetworkX's signature:
  G.nodes.data()                      # all attrs
  G.nodes.data('color')               # specific attr
  G.nodes.data('missing', default='NA')  # with default

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
